base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of blue_imp_green_imp_mud_imp_and_stone_imp — a character from 1995 chrono trigger. Blue Imp, Green Imp, Mud Imp & Stone Imp. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
